meta.project: Eric Bellinger Website Copy + Data Manifest
meta.purpose: Replacement-ready website copy and implementation data for the Eric Bellinger website.
meta.inputFilePurpose: Structured copy manifest for ChatGPT to fill in replacement-ready site copy
importantDataRules: Do not render generic Unsplash art as artist cover art.
Use null/NEEDS_RESEARCH for exact DSP URLs, production credits, personnel credits, and cover art not verified.
Writer/producer/personnel credits should be shown only when present in the dataset or verified source.
Ticket availability/status must be rechecked before launch because it can change.

researchSummary.careerPositioning: Grammy-connected R&B singer/songwriter with a large songwriting catalog, a deep solo discography, verified guest/collaboration archive, and current 2026 live dates.
researchSummary.grammyWordingCaution: Use “Grammy-winning songwriter” carefully. GRAMMY.com artist profile lists Eric Bellinger with 0 wins and 2 nominations as an artist profile, while GRAMMY editorial says his work on Chris Brown’s F.A.M.E. earned him his first GRAMMY Award for Best R&B Album in 2012.

hero.headline: Cry In Front Of You
hero.summary: Released March 27, 2026, “Cry In Front Of You” brings the newest chapter into focus while the live section routes fans to verified 2026 dates in Philadelphia, Chicago, New York, Nashville, Atlanta, and Los Angeles.

discography.heading: Discography
